tools.name: termux_battery_status
tools.description: Get the battery status of the device: percentage, temperature, health and charging state.

tools.name: termux_torch
tools.description: Turn the device flashlight (torch) on or off.

tools.name: termux_brightness
tools.description: Set the screen brightness of the device display.

tools.name: termux_notification
tools.description: Display a system notification with a title and message body.

tools.name: termux_toast
tools.description: Show a short transient popup (toast) message on screen.

text.description: Text to show in the toast.

tools.name: termux_clipboard_get
tools.description: Read the current contents of the system clipboard.

tools.name: termux_clipboard_set
tools.description: Set the contents of the system clipboard.

text.description: Text to place on the clipboard.

tools.name: termux_tts_speak
tools.description: Speak text out loud using the device text-to-speech engine.

language.description: Language code such as en or ar.

tools.name: termux_sensor
tools.description: Read values from a hardware sensor on the device.

sensor.description: Sensor name: accelerometer, gyroscope, light, proximity, pressure, magnetic_field or gravity.

tools.name: termux_location
tools.description: Get the current geographic location of the device.

provider.description: Location provider: gps, network or passive.

request.description: Request type: once, last or updates.

tools.name: termux_wifi_connectioninfo
tools.description: Get information about the current wifi connection such as network name and signal.

tools.name: termux_volume
tools.description: Set the volume of an audio stream on the device.

stream.description: Audio stream: music, ring, alarm, notification, system or call.

tools.name: termux_media_player
tools.description: Control media playback on the device: play a file, pause, stop or get info.

action.description: One of play, pause, stop or info.

file.description: Path of the media file to play.

tools.name: termux_download
tools.description: Download a file from a URL using the system download manager.

url.description: URL of the file to download.

title.description: Title to show for the download.

tools.name: termux_camera_info
tools.description: Get information about the cameras available on the device.
